Image.alt: November 14, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 14, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 14, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbaiís Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: The Menís Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 ñ Menís Doubles Open Quarterfinal ñ Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 ñ Menís Doubles Open Quarterfinal ñ Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 ñ Menís Doubles Open Quarterfinal ñ Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 ñ Menís Doubles Open Quarterfinal ñ Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: Rob Nunnery & Ryler Deheart faced off against Hunter Johnson & Yates Johnson in a quarterfinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this Mixed Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Beth Bellamy and Rick Witsken team up with power and precision as they face off against the dynamic duo of Eva Welsher and Altaf Merchant. With each rally more intense than the last, the match showcases expert-level shot placement, quick hands at the kitchen, and the emotional highs and lows of championship pickleball.From thrilling volleys to strategic momentum shifts, this final clash is a must-watch for fans of senior pro competition. Watch as tempers flare, crowds roar, and legends battle for the ultimate title in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 ñ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ñ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Image.alt: US Open 2023 ñ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ñ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 ñ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ñ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 ñ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ñ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Video.summary: Experience the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball as Virginia Tech and Liberty University battle for the NCPA 2025 Virginia Beach Regional title. This high-stakes championship matchup features a prize pool of $2,500 and a chance for regional dominance.The action kicks off with an elite menís doubles match featuring Libertyís Ben Rice and Derek Cray against Virginia Techís undefeated Cody Miller and Caelan Funk. The broadcast also captures intense singles play and critical mixed doubles rallies as both teams fight through high-tension dink battles and "Dreambreaker" level strategy. Watch for standout defensive plays, including ATP (Around the Post) attempts and high-speed hand battles on the Championship Court at Pickleball Virginia Beach.
Video.title: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Image.alt: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Video.summary: In this alternate cut of the Womenís Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournamentís most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball 2024 ñ Womenís Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal ñ Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball 2024 ñ Womenís Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal ñ Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 ñ Womenís Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal ñ Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 ñ Womenís Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal ñ Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Video.summary: This Men's Senior Pro Doubles match from the US Open 2025 features the team of Schiller and Weinbach battling Bronson and Coker. The commentary captures crucial moments, strategic missteps, and the competitive flow between these seasoned players, ultimately leading to a clear win for Schiller and Weinbach.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a critical Day 4 clash between the Rajasthan Titans and the league-leading Chennai Super Champs. Entering the tie as heavy favorites, coach Johnny Goldbergís Chennai squad looks to solidify their top spot on the leaderboard. Meanwhile, the Rajasthan Titans, led by coach Leigh Whitwell, are desperate to find their rhythm and climb the points table after a challenging start to the season.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you wonít want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 ñ Mixed Doubles ñ Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 ñ Mixed Doubles ñ Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 ñ Mixed Doubles ñ Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 ñ Mixed Doubles ñ Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team Englandís Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team Franceís Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.
Video.title: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Image.alt: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Video.summary: Texas duo Munro and Manzano take on Floridaís Foster and Chassang in the 2025 DUPR National Championship Menís Doubles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball glory.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas
